title: Ascendency Path of Star
atAGlance: A cosmic guidance path blending foresight, precision support, and controlled bursts of stellar force.
sageNotes: Star bearers are navigators of fate-lines, prized for turning uncertain omens into practical decisions. They read pattern within chaos and guide allies toward victories too narrow for ordinary sight. Caravan masters say a true Star adept saves lives twice: once before the danger, and once inside it.
gameInformation: Hybrid support/control path with omen dice, reroute mechanics, and radiant-force spikes tuned for consistency over raw burst.
